title: F1: rewrite bootstrap canonical template + .fabric/AGENTS.md to two-step real API (plan_context → get_knowledge_sections)
description: The current bootstrap-canonical.ts template + .fabric/AGENTS.md teach the LLM a single-step `fab_get_knowledge_sections(id=...)` call that does NOT match the real two-step API (which requires a selection_token from fab_plan_context plus ai_selected_stable_ids + sections). This produces guaranteed schema-validation failures on the very first KB read. F1 is the highest-urgency rc.23 scope because every fresh-installed agent will hit it. Rewrite both surfaces (1) the source-of-truth template at packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts and (2) the project bootstrap doc .fabric/AGENTS.md to describe the real two-step flow: call fab_plan_context(paths=[...]) → inspect plan_context.entries[].selectable===true → pick one or more stable_ids → call fab_get_knowledge_sections(selection_token, ai_selected_stable_ids=[...], sections=[...]).

files.change: 替换单步 fab_get_knowledge_sections(id=...) 描述为完整两步流程文本(plan_context → 选 selectable → get_knowledge_sections with selection_token + ai_selected_stable_ids + sections);保留中文措辞风格

files.target: L11 行为规则 / L18 知识库 (KB) Usage 行
files.change: L11 修改修改前调用顺序;L18 Usage 行从 `用 fab_get_knowledge_sections(id=...) 按 id 取条目全文` 改为完整两步描述,显式 selection_token 是从 fab_plan_context 返回的

implementation: Read current packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts to locate exact L71/L78 anchor strings

Rewrite the two relevant blocks to teach: step 1 — fab_plan_context(paths=[<files>]) returns entries with selectable=true; step 2 — fab_get_knowledge_sections({selection_token, ai_selected_stable_ids: [...], sections: ['MISSION_STATEMENT','REFERENCE','DIRECTIVES','EVIDENCE']})

Mirror the same wording into .fabric/AGENTS.md (note: AGENTS.md is the generated bootstrap output, but rc.22 ledger keeps it the canonical project KB README — so manually patch it ONCE so user docs match before next fab install regen)

Validate the template renders: run `node -e "const t=require('./packages/shared/dist/templates/bootstrap-canonical.js'); console.log(t.default || t.template)"` to dump output (after `pnpm -F @fabric/shared build`)
Confirm no stray references to bare `fab_get_knowledge_sections(id=...)` remain in template OR AGENTS.md via grep
Add a unit test in packages/shared/src/templates/__tests__/bootstrap-canonical.test.ts that asserts the rendered output contains both `fab_plan_context` AND `ai_selected_stable_ids`

reference.pattern: Existing CDATA-style multi-line bootstrap template literal
reference.examples: Mirror tone of existing 知识库 (KB) section; keep four-bullet rhythm

criteria: Rendered bootstrap template contains both literal strings `fab_plan_context` and `ai_selected_stable_ids`
Unit test packages/shared/src/templates/__tests__/bootstrap-canonical.test.ts asserts presence of two-step keywords and passes
Manual `fab install` dry-run renders the two-step flow into the three target client AGENTS.md managed blocks

rationale.chosen_approach: Edit source template + manually patch .fabric/AGENTS.md once — keeps next-fab-install propagation correct and unblocks current users immediately
alternatives_considered: Only edit template, regenerate via fab install (rejected: current AGENTS.md stays broken until reinstall)
Add an aliasing shim in fab_get_knowledge_sections that accepts bare id (rejected: violates feedback_clean_slate.md no-compat-shim policy)
decision_factors: F1 is highest-urgency — every fresh install breaks today
Two-step API is intentional (plan_context is the necessary precondition for relevance scoring)
rationale.tradeoffs: Slight wording bloat in bootstrap (two-step flow needs ~4 lines vs 1) — acceptable for correctness

manual_checks: Run fab install in a scratch repo and verify the rendered .fabric/AGENTS.md teaches the two-step flow
Feed the rendered AGENTS.md to a fresh agent session and confirm it makes the correct fab_plan_context → fab_get_knowledge_sections call sequence
